'''ây-z-m-k''' ('''kayazmekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:near|near]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-z-m-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:near|near]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-z-m-k
|-
! Lemma
| kayazmekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyazmekoko|thiyazmekoko]] || [[word:jiyazmekoko|jiyazmekoko]] || [[word:shiyazmekoko|shiyazmekoko]] || [[word:kiyazmekoko|kiyazmekoko]]
|-

|-
